title: calophyllum complanatum
intro: Calophyllum complanatum, also known as the 'Tallow tree' or 'Tallow nut tree', is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum complanatum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as oil, extract, and tincture, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
